---
title: "General the Hon. Sir Francis Colborne"
---

## General the Hon. Sir Francis Colborne

**Dates:** (1817-1895)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Second son of the 1st Lord Seaton, he was probably not the Frank Colborne having trouble with his ears in 1870.

### Letters

- Letter from Monday 17th April [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
